response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video for song titles and performers using on-screen text.
2. Song 1 detected: 'Into Gray'. Performer: Shishiro Botan & Amane Kanata. Searched for lyrics but they were not clearly available, set to null.
3. Dialogue scene identified: 01:09 - 02:40.
4. Song 2 detected: 'Asphodelus'. Performer: Shishiro Botan & Amane Kanata. Original composer identified as Kotaro Odaka. Searched for lyrics and successfully retrieved them.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two songs performed by VTubers Shishiro Botan and Amane Kanata, separated by a brief in-game dialogue scene.

scenes.description: Shishiro Botan and Amane Kanata perform 'Into Gray', with the title appearing in the top-left corner.
A visual novel-style dialogue scene between Shishiro Botan and Amane Kanata.
Shishiro Botan and Amane Kanata perform 'Asphodelus', with the title and production credits appearing on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
囚われた絶望の淵で
わたしを抱きしめてください
静寂に埋め尽くされ 一人で凍えてる
崩れ堕ちてゆく楽園の果てで
忘れられた祈りが響いてる
支配する闇の中でも涸れない愛よ
目覚めよ 永久に
無限に降る孤独を その指で染めてください
叫ぶこの心が 悲しみを愛せるように
まだ見ぬあの光...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Please hold me in this abyss of trapped despair.
Engulfed in silence, I am freezing alone.
At the end of this crumbling paradise, 
The forgotten prayer is resounding.
Oh love that does not wither even in the ruling darkness,
Awaken, eternally.
Please dye this infinitely falling loneliness with those fingers,
So that this screaming heart can love the sadness.
The light that I have yet to see...
